# api

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/api"
```

Package api provides a RESTful HTTP API server that exposes all SolarSage astrology tools as JSON endpoints. It wraps the same underlying packages used by the MCP server, providing a thin adapter layer over net/http.

All 40 endpoints are POST\-only under /api/v1/, with optional API key authentication via the X\-API\-Key header and CORS support.
